title: espeletia santanderensis
intro: Espeletia santanderensis, also known as Santander Andean Tree or Tree Espinillo, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Andean region of Colombia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Espeletia santanderensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
